user_task_description: Clean the comprehensive handbook draft into a structured DOCX without rewriting its live content.
single_step_benchmark_instruction: Remove the visible Draft: prefixes, restore the exact chapter headings in order, refresh the table of contents, preserve the English and Chinese paragraphs, keep the table values unchanged, normalize body style, and put Appendix A - Release Checklist on a fresh page with the document header and footer.
atomic_scope: Only the bounded document-wide edits and structural changes explicitly requested.
expected_output_type: A revised .docx document that completes the requested single-document workflow.

notes.Task Notes: - Preserve unrelated content unless the task explicitly requires a change

required_paragraphs: This handbook demonstrates the complete single-document publication workflow.
It covers document structure, bilingual text, tables, navigation, and release formatting.
Body paragraphs now share one publication style.
Important examples use consistent emphasis without draft markers.
The table below summarizes final sales and feature coverage.
All numeric totals and labels are publication ready.
English and Chinese content remain readable in the same body style.
中文段落与英文段落在最终稿中保持一致的正文排版。
Every circulation page uses the handbook header and page footer.
The appendix starts after a clear page break.
The comprehensive handbook is ready for distribution.
